'''âh-z-zh''' ('''kahazazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:allide|allide]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:allide|allide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-z-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kahazazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihazazh|thihazazh]] || [[word:jihazazh|jihazazh]] || [[word:shihazazh|shihazazh]] || [[word:kihazazh|kihazazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhazazh|thuthuhazazh]] || [[word:jujuhazazh|jujuhazazh]] || [[word:shushuhazazh|shushuhazazh]] || [[word:kukuhazazh|kukuhazazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhazazh|thuhazazh]] || [[word:juhazazh|juhazazh]] || [[word:shuhazazh|shuhazazh]] || [[word:kuhazazh|kuhazazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhazazh|thuhazazh]] || [[word:juhazazh|juhazazh]] || [[word:shuhazazh|shuhazazh]] || [[word:kuhazazh|kuhazazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehazazh|thehazazh]] || [[word:jehazazh|jehazazh]] || [[word:shehazazh|shehazazh]] || [[word:kehazazh|kehazazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohazazh|thothohazazh]] || [[word:jojohazazh|jojohazazh]] || [[word:shoshohazazh|shoshohazazh]] || [[word:kokohazazh|kokohazazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohazazh|thohazazh]] || [[word:johazazh|johazazh]] || [[word:shohazazh|shohazazh]] || [[word:kohazazh|kohazazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohazazh|thohazazh]] || [[word:johazazh|johazazh]] || [[word:shohazazh|shohazazh]] || [[word:kohazazh|kohazazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhazazh|thĂŠhazazh]] || [[word:jĂŠhazazh|jĂŠhazazh]] || [[word:shĂŠhazazh|shĂŠhazazh]] || [[word:kĂŠhazazh|kĂŠhazazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahazazh|thathahazazh]] || [[word:jajahazazh|jajahazazh]] || [[word:shashahazazh|shashahazazh]] || [[word:kakahazazh|kakahazazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahazazh|thahazazh]] || [[word:jahazazh|jahazazh]] || [[word:shahazazh|shahazazh]] || [[word:kahazazh|kahazazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahazazh|thahazazh]] || [[word:jahazazh|jahazazh]] || [[word:shahazazh|shahazazh]] || [[word:kahazazh|kahazazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahazazh|shahazazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahazazh|goshahazazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahazazh|gokishahazazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahazazhnĂŒ|shahazazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahazazhnknĂŒ|goshahazazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazazhnĂŒ|gokishahazazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahazazhshĂ«|shahazazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkshĂ«|goshahazazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahazazhshĂ«|gokishahazazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazazhro|shahazazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkro|goshahazazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazazhro|gokishahazazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazazhmu|shahazazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkmu|goshahazazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazazhmu|gokishahazazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahazazhsher|shahazazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahazazhnksher|goshahazazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahazazhsher|gokishahazazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahazazhng|shahazazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkng|goshahazazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahazazhng|gokishahazazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahazazhya|shahazazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkya|goshahazazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahazazhya|gokishahazazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahazazhyam|shahazazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkyam|goshahazazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahazazhyam|gokishahazazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazazhnĂŒshĂ«|shahazazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahazazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahazazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazazhnĂŒro|shahazazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazazhnknĂŒro|goshahazazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazazhnĂŒro|gokishahazazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazazhnĂŒmu|shahazazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazazhnknĂŒmu|goshahazazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazazhnĂŒmu|gokishahazazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shahazazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahazazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahazazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazazhshĂ«ro|shahazazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkshĂ«ro|goshahazazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazazhshĂ«ro|gokishahazazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazazhshĂ«mu|shahazazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkshĂ«mu|goshahazazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazazhshĂ«mu|gokishahazazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazazhronĂŒ|shahazazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkronĂŒ|goshahazazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazazhronĂŒ|gokishahazazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazazhroshĂ«|shahazazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkroshĂ«|goshahazazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazazhroshĂ«|gokishahazazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazazhromu|shahazazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkromu|goshahazazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazazhromu|gokishahazazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazazhmunĂŒ|shahazazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkmunĂŒ|goshahazazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazazhmunĂŒ|gokishahazazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazazhmushĂ«|shahazazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkmushĂ«|goshahazazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazazhmushĂ«|gokishahazazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazazhmuro|shahazazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazazhnkmuro|goshahazazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazazhmuro|gokishahazazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
